testcase.name: testGetAnnouncements
testcase.system-out:
15:02:26.087 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.studyroom.controller.PublicControllerTest]: PublicControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:02:26.230 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.studyroom.StudyRoomApplication for test class com.example.studyroom.controller.PublicControllerTest 2026-03-29T15:02:26.670+08:00 INFO 25084 --- [study-room-backend] [ main] c.e.s.controller.PublicControllerTest : Starting PublicControllerTest using Java 23 with PID 25084 (started by 72859 in C:\Users\72859\Desktop\移动计算方向专业实践\StudyRoom\backend) 2026-03-29T15:02:26.674+08:00 INFO 25084 --- [study-room-backend] [ main] c.e.s.controller.PublicControllerTest : The following 1 profile is active: "dev" 2026-03-29T15:02:27.359+08:00 INFO 25084 --- [study-room-backend] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Multiple Spring Data modules found, entering strict repository configuration mode 2026-03-29T15:02:27.359+08:00 INFO 25084 --- [study-room-backend] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Bootstrapping Spring Data Redis repositories in DEFAULT mode. 2026-03-29T15:02:27.382+08:00 INFO 25084 --- [study-room-backend] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Finished Spring Data repository scanning in 10 ms. Using generated security password: 62971e4e-1551-47b5-ac39-6c8c4ba9c7df

testcase.name: testGetCarousels
testcase.system-out: Creating a new SqlSession SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@5b11d0d8] was not registered for synchronization because synchronization is not active JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1559469558 wrapping com.mysql.cj.jdbc.ConnectionImpl@279e85eb] will not be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: SELECT id,image_url,sort_order,status FROM carousels WHERE (status = ?) ORDER BY sort_order ASC ==> Parameters: 1(Integer) <== Total: 0 Closing non transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@5b11d0d8]
